description: A financial transaction — double-entry ledger record of a value transfer between accounts. Amounts are stored as strings to avoid floating-point precision issues.

context_schema.amount: string — transaction amount as a decimal string (e.g. '125.00')
context_schema.currency: string — ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. USD, ETH, BTC)
context_schema.from_account: string? — source account artifact ID or address
context_schema.to_account: string? — destination account artifact ID or address
context_schema.tx_hash: string? — blockchain transaction hash for on-chain transfers

ui.label: Transaction
ui.description: Financial transaction — value transfer with amount, currency, and status.
